description: Functions and classes for working with structural elements.

functions.name: count
functions.description: Get the number of structural elements.

functions.name: find
functions.description: Get the structural element object with the given ID number.

functions.name: list
functions.description: Get the structural element iterator object.

functions.name: maxid
functions.description: Get the maximum structural element ID.

functions.name: mech_convergence
functions.description: Get the maximum convergence value (local ratio divided by target ratio) of all structural nodes in the model.

functions.name: mech_ratio_avg
functions.description: Get the average convergence ratio of all structural nodes in the model.

functions.name: mech_ratio_local
functions.description: Get the maximum local convergence ratio of all structural nodes in the model.

functions.name: mech_ratio_max
functions.description: Get the ratio of maximum unbalanced force to average applied force of all structural nodes in the model.

functions.name: near
functions.description: find the closest structural element to a point.
